title: Gratitude for the Curly Hats
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on gratitude for the curly hats within the The Two Kings of Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: The two dukes, who could no longer stand the sight of each others' faces...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: decided to split their working hours into two halves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "Along with the sun, from 6 in the morning to 6 in the night"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: and "along with the moon, from 6 in the night to 6 in the morning".

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Woah!! The doctors passed out right along- side him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Everyone from this Fort has already fallen asleep.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Crap, all this talk about sleep's making me drowsy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's Sicilian, the one whos always puts his all into everything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This reversal of day and night affects us as well... the ones from "The Town" are active during the day,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: While those from "the forest" keep to nocturnal hours ...this applies to combat situations as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Please, we beg of you to stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thank goodness!! Let's leave it to them and fall back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Keep the losses to a mini- Mum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Seizing their weapons is our top priority!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They have some peculiar warriors on their side....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Beware of the ones with "Black Horns"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Could they be from an unknown race?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: His hand trans- formed into a wolf !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Agile musket- EERS, LEAD THE TOWNSPEOPLE TO SAFETY IN THE FOREST!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: cease this violence and destruction at once!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I swear on the gods, this person you seek is not in our land!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This con- frontation will bear no fruit and is absolutely futile!!!

summary: Gratitude for the Curly Hats: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
